text: New addition - strategic review & formal sale process, after going into administration.
Board rejects StoneX's indicative offer of 95p - "significantly undervalues" company
Scheme document published - vote scheduled for 15 April 2026
Shareholders approve scheme, with over 99% of votes. Effective date 20 April 2026.
New addition - strategic review, company has engaged with a limited number of counterparties.
